permits.work_description:
Remove existing roof systems.  Install new warranty 20 year system.
 
Remove existing (2) roof systems down to the steel deck below 
Mechanically fasten, per manufacturer’s recommendations, (2) layers of 2.2”- 20 p.s.i. polyisocyanurate insulation equalingR25. 
Embed ½” per foot tapered crickets in ribbons of LRF adhesive, between primary drainage points & at the backside of HVACcurbs. 
Embed (1) layer of 5/8” DensDeck, StormX Prime VSH, high-density coverboard in ribbons of low-rise foam adhesive.
Embed (1) layer of Sopralene Flam 180 in Coldply EF adhesive.
Heat-weld (1) layer of Sopralene Flam 180 FR GR.
Heat-weld (1) layer of Sopralene Flam 180 & Sopralene Flam 180 FR GR at flashing conditions.
Fabricate and install new 24-guage galvanized steel overflow scuppers with prefinished faceplates to match the existing locations. 
Fabricate and install new 24-gauge prefinished steel gutters, downspouts & counter flashings.
Upon completion, furnish a 20-year, No-Dollar-Limit warranty from the materials manufacturer for the low-slope roof assembly, 20-year finish warranty for pre-finished metal & 2-year standard installers warranty.
We will be modifying the front exterior door opening for the new front exterior door

permits.work_description:
Roof Replacement for Entire Community

TPO Roof Installation

Removal and disposal of existing roofing system.
-Inspect substrate for an appropriate nailable surface.
-Installation of 1/2” fanfold mechanically attached with 3” ISO Plates following
manufacturer specs.
-Install mechanically attached 60 mill TPO on the field with barbed TPO plates 1ft on
center.
-Install fully adhered 60 mill TPO going up and over on parapet walls at least 8 inches.
-Terminate all walls with 1" termination bar Mechanically attached with 2" corrosion free
screws and water cut off.
-Install 3in TPO coated drip edge following manufacturers specs.
-Install pipe jack flashing with 20x20" target for double protection

Mansard Roof Installation
-Removal and disposal of the existing roofing system down to deck. -Installation of full Synthetic underlayment using 1in plastic caps, as well as selfadhering ice & watershield on valleys & headwalls. -Replace all exhaust ventilation pipe jacks with metal roofing dektite flashings. -Paint all penetration pipes and dektite fashings with manufacturer-recommended paint. -Install foam closures on the ridge line and transition flashings to ensure a proper seal. -Fabricate and install 26-gauge flashings as needed for the exposed fastener roofing system. -Deliver and install CertainTeed Lifetime Architectural Shingles on mansards. -Conduct a thorough inspection post-installation to ensure compliance with quality standards. -Remove all debris and clean the work area to leave it in pristine condition.

permits.work_description: This project focuses on the repair and restoration of weathered exterior elements to match the existing aesthetic. We will replace the rotted garage-side door with a 32" x 80" white steel security door featuring a metal frame and screen. All wood rot on the cupola, window frames, gable vent, shingles and rear trim will be replaced with new wood and painted to match the current trim. Additionally, any gaps in the brickwork will be sealed with mortar repair mix and painted to blend seamlessly with the original brick color.

Project consists of renovation of an existing residential property located within a historic district. Work will include roof replacement due to wear, maintaining the existing roofline, pitch, and overall exterior appearance.

Interior renovations will include updates to plumbing and electrical systems, along with minor reconfiguration of interior spaces to accommodate bathroom and laundry improvements.

No changes will be made to the building footprint. Exterior will remain consistent with the existing structure, and all work will comply with historic district guidelines.
